content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows broad-based positive opens across sectors (Nifty +0.42%, all sectoral indices green) but US markets closed weak overnight (Nasdaq -0.90%) and VIX at 18.05 remains elevated. Book is already 45% deployed with 3 working pending orders — incremental adds need a high bar. Priority is managing existing positions, several of which have moved into profit and need SL trails.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA<1%), MOFSL Buy with avg target Rs 1,081. Stock at Rs 1044 with +6.2% gain. Current SL at 1028 already locks in ~4.5% gain — keeping it. Raising target to 1110 (near consensus) since stock has structural rate-cut tailwind. Will trail aggressively if it pushes through 1080. CANFINHOME -3.5% peer weakness is a watch signal but PNBHOUSING-specific results override sector beta near-term."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, fresh 52w high). At Rs 1445 with +2.3% gain. SL at 1425 is already at breakeven+. Raising target to 1485 given momentum break above prior 52w high (1437) and FMCG sector strength. Holding tight SL — if volatility shakes out, exit at 1425 with small gain locked."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (entry 404.50 = SL 404.50). Q4 results May 15 are a near-term event. Power sector strong YTD. Holding HOLD-equivalent — no change to SL or target since already at breakeven. NOTE: this is essentially a no-op MODIFY; converting to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Organon $11.75bn deal a major positive catalyst — stock jumped 7-9% Apr 28. SL already at breakeven (1735 vs entry 1734). HDFC target Rs 2,030. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 465.00,
      "new_target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +11% YoY, Rs 26.75 FY26 dividend. Stock at 469.85, +0.2% gain. Tightening SL from 463 to 465 (still below entry of 469 but reducing downside to ~0.8%). Summer demand tailwind intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES at -1.9% with SL at 119. Gold under near-term pressure (hawkish Fed, USD strength) but medium-term outlook bullish per JPM/GS. SL at 119 is ~3% below current — appropriate hedge tag. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%. Q4 results May 19 upcoming. SL at 315 (~1.6% below CMP) is tight enough. No change warranted yet."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "reasoning": "Existing SL already locks in ~4.5% gain. Will trail higher only if price pushes above 1080. Watching CANFINHOME peer weakness as a sector signal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1425 is just below entry (1413) — locks in marginal gain. Fresh 52w high, strong Q4. Let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven. Q4 May 15 event risk. No reason to tighten further before results clarity."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven post-Organon news. Letting deal optimism play out toward 1830 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 465.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL by 2 points to reduce downside risk from 1.3% to ~1% on this small-gain position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive allocation. SL at 119 is ~3% below CMP. Near-term gold weakness on Fed hawkishness but structural hedge maintained."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat position, Q4 May 19 catalyst pending. SL at 315 (1.6% below) is appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSTOWER Q4 result on Apr 30 — wait for print before entering. RELIANCE at Rs 1389 — would consider on a dip toward 1340-1350 support post-Q4 earnings digestion. RKFORGE board meeting May 1 + earnings May 4 — wait for results before entry given P/E 45 elevation. JSWENERGY at 581 already at upper Bollinger and lagging peers — no chase. INTELLECT mid-cap with lumpy earnings, May 8 board meeting — avoid pre-print. CANFINHOME -3.5% is a sector warning for PNBHOUSING — monitoring closely.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed with 3 OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) which if all fill would add ~Rs 1.4L deployment, taking book to ~60%. Per deployment hysteresis rule, no new entries today. Performance context shows 5-day net P&L of -Rs 4,408 with 14% win rate and 0.4x profit factor — this is a clear signal to focus on capital preservation, tighten SLs, and avoid fresh entries. Main risks: housing finance sector pressure (PNBHOUSING ~Rs 83K position is ~8% of book), pharma deal-dependent rally on SUNPHARMA. All SLs are now at or near breakeven on profitable positions — risk profile materially improved this tick."
}
